name: quick-scenes
description: Quick Scenes & Handouts - Create scenes or show handouts to players quickly from File Picker, Tile Explorer or Journals

scripts.bump: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && git add package.json ./src/module.json README.md
scripts.bump:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && git add package.json ./src/module.json README.md
scripts.bump:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && git add package.json ./src/module.json README.md
